outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; spot well above gamma flip zone with flat skew
outlook.summary: Price consolidating between 650 resonance support and 655 resistance. Market makers providing strong structural support at 650 across all expiries. Range-bound trading likely.

levels.motivazione: Dominant call OI across ALL expiries (13,271 0DTE, 4,278 WEEKLY, 804 MONTHLY). Dealers short calls below spot create structural support through delta hedging.
Highest OI in MONTHLY (2,613). Primary resistance above spot. Dealer hedging creates selling pressure on approach.
Significant call OI in 0DTE (2,428) and WEEKLY (553). Secondary support level if 650 fails.
High OI (1,164) in MONTHLY directly at spot. Pin risk zone for expiry. Price attraction active.
